# Simeon Ivanov — AI Engineer, DevOps & Full-Stack Developer

> Full article content available at https://simeonivanov.dev/llms-full.txt

## About

Simeon Ivanov is an AI Engineer, DevOps practitioner, and Full-Stack Developer specialising in LLM-powered products, scalable APIs, and developer tooling. He builds production-grade AI systems — from RAG pipelines and autonomous agents to cloud cost optimisation platforms and real-time voice assistants.

## Expertise

- **LLM & RAG**: Production RAG pipelines with hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval, query rewriting, re-ranking, streaming responses. Frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, LangSmith, LangServe.
- **AI Agents**: Multi-agent architectures, tool-calling, memory management, human-in-the-loop escalation, SLOs and guardrails for production agents.
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, CI/CD, FinOps, infrastructure right-sizing, anomaly detection.
- **Full-Stack**: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Python (FastAPI, Django), Java (Spring Boot).
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Pinecone, Qdrant, OpenSearch, Redis.
- **Mobile**: Android (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM).

## Blog

Technical writing on AI engineering, LLMs, and software development:

- https://simeonivanov.dev/blog/agent-reliability-blueprint — Agent Reliability Blueprint: SLOs, Guardrails, and Human Override. Practical architecture for shipping autonomous AI agents safely in production.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/blog/production-llm-pipeline — Building a production LLM pipeline in 2025. What nobody tells you about taking an LLM demo to production — chunking, eval loops, cost control.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/blog/why-rag-beats-finetuning — Why RAG beats fine-tuning for most use cases. Retrieval-Augmented Generation vs fine-tuning for 90% of production AI use cases.

## Projects

Selected work:

- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/rag — GPT Document Intelligence. Natural language querying over PDF libraries using LangChain, OpenAI embeddings, and Pinecone. Hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/agent — Autonomous Incident Commander. Multi-agent SRE system that detects incidents, builds causal graphs, executes runbooks, and drafts postmortems.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/devops — FinOps Autopilot. AI platform for cloud cost forecasting, anomaly detection, and infrastructure right-sizing PRs.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/saas — Voice Revenue Copilot. Real-time sales assistant with live transcription, objection-handling playbooks, and CRM sync.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/resume — Talent Intelligence Graph. Recruiting system that converts resumes and job descriptions into a skills graph with explainable candidate-role matches.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/style — Generative Brand Studio. Multimodal creative suite turning brand briefs into hero visuals, landing page variants, and tokenized design systems.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/email-rag — High-Traffic Email RAG Engine. Production pipeline ingesting millions of emails/day with hybrid retrieval and p99 latency under 300ms.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/langchain-platform — LangChain AI Application Platform. Multi-tenant platform with LCEL pipelines, LangSmith tracing, LangGraph workflows.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/mcp-platform — Claude MCP Integration Platform. Suite of production Model Context Protocol servers with OAuth-scoped auth and audit logging.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/quizforge — QuizzYourself. AI quiz generation platform using LLMs.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/cookingintelligence — CookingIntelligence. AI recipe generation with interactive step-by-step cooking guidance.
- https://simeonivanov.dev/projects/botversehub — BotverseHub. Unified platform for managing, training, and chatting with AI bots.

## Contact

Available for consulting, freelance, and full-time opportunities in AI engineering, DevOps, and full-stack development.
Contact form: https://simeonivanov.dev/#contact
